text: Quality control

This chapter is a sanity pass over the four loaded modalities. It confirms that each target materialises at the expected shape, that the single-nucleus microglia carry a fully-crossed genotype-by-batch design, and that their per-nucleus quality metrics sit inside predeclared physical bounds. No reprocessing happens here: clustering, substate assignment and differential expression arrive in later phases. The bounds below are definitional rails (a count is at least one, a percentage lies in nought to a hundred), not analysis thresholds, so a breach signals a load or computation fault and stops the render.
Modalities loaded
Each row is a separately stored targets object; the dimensions are read straight from the materialised target, so this table doubles as a load check across all four assays.
GeoMx genotype tally (no batch axis in the spatial design) and the proteomics key size:
snRNAseq microglia: design balance
The microglia subset should form a complete four-by-four genotype-by-batch grid with no empty cell; each of the 16 cells is a pseudobulk replicate downstream.

label: fig-qc-genotype-batch
text: Nuclei per genotype and batch. Every genotype-by-batch cell is populated, so all 16 pseudobulk replicates are estimable.
snRNAseq microglia: quality metrics
Library size and complexity per nucleus, by genotype (log scale; precomputed on the raw object, carried through the subset):

label: fig-qc-depth
text: Per-nucleus total counts and detected genes by genotype.
Mitochondrial, ribosomal, MALAT1 and non-microglial contamination fractions per nucleus, by genotype (linear scale; these motivate the QC thresholds applied later, not here):

label: fig-qc-fractions
text: Per-nucleus quality fractions by genotype. Shown for sanity only; no nuclei are filtered in this phase.
Sanity bounds (enforced)

The metric rails are definitional or physical, declared before inspecting the data: a count is at least one (no arbitrary upper ceiling); a detected-gene count is at least one and cannot exceed the genes assayed, nor the total counts; a percentage lies in nought to a hundred. The structural checks confirm the design grid, the canonical genotype factor and a one-to-one match between the 16 replicate ids and the genotype-by-batch cells. Any failure aborts the render.
